question: Which year has the highest total number of individuals receiving regular unemployment insurance benefits starting from 2001? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A labor market analyst wants to pinpoint the peak year of unemployment insurance beneficiaries to contextualize economic disruptions.

1.fact: In this dataset, summing Beneficiaries across all records by Year, 2020 has the highest total beneficiaries at 11,355,300.
1.subquestion: Which year has the highest total number of individuals receiving regular unemployment insurance benefits starting from 2001? (Group by Year; sum Beneficiaries; choose the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum Beneficiaries by Year and select the maximum total; the peak year is 2020.
